mechanism_explained: A screening tests PPV is governed by prevalence; survival can rise from lead-time, length, and overdiagnosis bias without lives saved.
Imaging assigns a probability; tissue is ground truth, but a negative biopsy only excludes cancer to the extent the needle sampled the lesion.
A molecular result is actionable only when it clears analytic validity, clinical validity, AND decision-specific clinical utility.
Treatment intent governs which endpoint counts; surrogate endpoints (ORR, PFS) can improve while overall survival and QoL do not.
A biomarker match is a hypothesis about response, scored only by the response; matched and responded are distinct measurements.
Surgery cures localized cancer by removal; margin and sentinel-node status are inferences about residual disease from sampled tissue.
Less-invasive (recovery) differs from equivalent-for-the-cancer (survival); oncologic equivalence must be proven per operation (LACC trial).
Radiation damages DNA indiscriminately; selectivity is engineered via fractionation exploiting tumor-vs-normal alpha/beta differences.
A better dose distribution (proton Bragg peak) is a proxy; for most adult cancers it has not established better patient outcomes.
Cytotoxics work because tumor cells carry DNA-repair/apoptosis defects, not merely because they divide fast; dose tied to clearance (Calvert).
A dose is a property of the drug-in-this-patient (ADME); resistance is multi-mechanism, so single-target reversal (P-gp) failed.
